name: Dallas Cowboys
description: America's Team — Tom Landry, Tex Schramm, the Doomsday Defense, and five Lombardi Trophies.

questions.q: In what year did the Dallas Cowboys join the NFL as an expansion team?
Who was the first head coach of the Dallas Cowboys?

source.notes: Landry coached the Cowboys for 29 seasons (1960–1988).

questions.q: What was the Cowboys' record in their first NFL season in 1960?
Who was the Cowboys' first president and general manager?

source.notes: Hired from CBS Sports; Schramm built much of the modern NFL alongside Pete Rozelle.

questions.q: Which Hall of Fame quarterback led the Cowboys to wins in Super Bowls VI and XII?

source.notes: Won the Heisman at Navy in 1963; nicknamed 'Captain America' and 'Roger the Dodger'.

questions.q: Which team did the Cowboys lose to in the famous 1967 'Ice Bowl' NFL Championship?

source.notes: Played at Lambeau Field in -13°F windchill.

questions.q: Which team did Dallas defeat to win Super Bowl VI, its first championship?

source.notes: Won 24-3 after the 1971 season; Roger Staubach was MVP.

questions.q: What nickname was given to the dominant Cowboys defense of the 1970s?
Which Cowboys linebacker became the only player to win Super Bowl MVP from a losing team?

source.notes: Super Bowl V — Cowboys lost 16-13 to the Baltimore Colts.

questions.q: What famous nickname did NFL Films coin for the Cowboys?

source.notes: Coined by NFL Films editor Bob Ryan in the team's 1978 highlight reel.

questions.q: How many straight winning seasons did the Cowboys post from 1966 to 1985 — an NFL record?

source.notes: 1966–1985 — still the longest streak of consecutive winning seasons in NFL history.

questions.q: Which 49ers play at the end of the 1981 NFC Championship is famously called 'The Catch'?

source.notes: Dwight Clark's leaping back-of-the-end-zone grab beat Dallas 28-27 to send San Francisco to Super Bowl XVI.

questions.q: Which team did the Cowboys lose to in Super Bowl X (after the 1975 season)?

source.notes: Lost 21-17. The Cowboys also lost SB XIII to the Steelers three years later.

questions.q: What was the Cowboys' first home stadium, used from 1960 to 1971?

source.notes: Located at Fair Park in Dallas.

questions.q: Texas Stadium, the Cowboys' home from 1971 to 2008, was famous for what unusual feature?
choices: A partial hole in the roof

source.notes: Sportscaster D.D. Lewis joked the hole existed 'so God can watch his favorite team play.'

questions.q: In what year did AT&T Stadium (originally Cowboys Stadium) open in Arlington, Texas?

source.notes: Opened May 27, 2009. Renamed AT&T Stadium in 2013.

questions.q: Where are the Dallas Cowboys' team headquarters and practice facility located?
Which other NFL team traditionally hosts a Thanksgiving Day game alongside the Cowboys?

source.notes: The Lions have hosted every Thanksgiving since 1934 (with WWII gaps); the Cowboys joined in 1966.

questions.q: In what year did the Dallas Cowboys first host an NFL Thanksgiving Day game?
Who was the Cowboys' starting quarterback when they appeared in Super Bowl V (their first Super Bowl)?

source.notes: Lost to the Baltimore Colts 16-13 on a last-second field goal.
